testcase.name: Landing Page Minimalista - Story 1.4 › P0-E2E-001: Usuario NO autenticado ve landing page con diseño minimalista

failure.message: story-1.4-landing-page.spec.ts:16:7 P0-E2E-001: Usuario NO autenticado ve landing page con diseño minimalista

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › story-1.4-landing-page.spec.ts:16:7 › Landing Page Minimalista - Story 1.4 › P0-E2E-001: Usuario NO autenticado ve landing page con diseño minimalista Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed Locator: getByText('GMAO') Expected: visible Error: strict mode violation: getByText('GMAO') resolved to 3 elements: 1)

GMAO Hiansa

aka getByRole('heading', { name: 'GMAO Hiansa' }) 2)

GMAO

aka getByRole('heading', { name: 'GMAO', exact: true }) 3)
…
aka getByText('© 2026 GMAO Hiansa. Todos los') Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for getByText('GMAO') 30 | // Check for "GMAO" text (NOT in h1 tag anymore, just text) 31 | const gmaoText = page.getByText('GMAO') > 32 | await expect(gmaoText).toBeVisible() | ^ 33 | 34 | // Check for "Acceder al Sistema" button 35 | const button = page.getByRole('button', { name: /acceder al sistema/i }) at C:\Users\ambso\dev\gmao-hiansa\tests\e2e\story-1.4-landing-page.spec.ts:32:28 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\story-1.4-landing-page-Lan-440ef-page-con-diseño-minimalista-chromium\test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\story-1.4-landing-page-Lan-440ef-page-con-diseño-minimalista-chromium\video.webm ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ..\..\test-results\story-1.4-landing-page-Lan-440ef-page-con-diseño-minimalista-chromium\error-context.md attachment #4: trace (application/zip) ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\story-1.4-landing-page-Lan-440ef-page-con-diseño-minimalista-chromium\trace.zip Usage: npx playwright show-trace ..\..\test-results\story-1.4-landing-page-Lan-440ef-page-con-diseño-minimalista-chromium\trace.zip ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Retry #1 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed Locator: getByText('GMAO') Expected: visible Error: strict mode violation: getByText('GMAO') resolved to 3 elements: 1)

testcase.name: Landing Page Minimalista - Story 1.4 › P0-E2E-002: Usuario autenticado es redirigido a /dashboard

failure.message: story-1.4-landing-page.spec.ts:51:7 P0-E2E-002: Usuario autenticado es redirigido a /dashboard

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › story-1.4-landing-page.spec.ts:51:7 › Landing Page Minimalista - Story 1.4 › P0-E2E-002: Usuario autenticado es redirigido a /dashboard
TimeoutError: page.fill: Timeout 15000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('input[name="email"]')
54 | 55 | // Fill in login form > 56 | await page.fill('input[name="email"]', 'admin@example.com') | ^ 57 | await page.fill('input[name="password"]', 'password123') 58 | 59 | // Submit login form at C:\Users\ambso\dev\gmao-hiansa\tests\e2e\story-1.4-landing-page.spec.ts:56:16

testcase.name: Landing Page Minimalista - Story 1.4 › P0-E2E-003: Botón "Acceder al Sistema" navega a /login
Landing Page Minimalista - Story 1.4 › P0-E2E-004: Landing page cumple WCAG AA (contraste, touch targets)

failure.message: story-1.4-landing-page.spec.ts:89:7 P0-E2E-004: Landing page cumple WCAG AA (contraste, touch targets)

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › story-1.4-landing-page.spec.ts:89:7 › Landing Page Minimalista - Story 1.4 › P0-E2E-004: Landing page cumple WCAG AA (contraste, touch targets)
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: getByRole('main') Expected: visible Error: strict mode violation: getByRole('main') resolved to 2 elements: 1) <main class="flex-1 container py-6">…</main> aka getByRole('main').first() 2) <main class=" min-h-screen bg-[#7D1220] flex flex-col items-center justify-center px-4 animate-in fade-in duration-300 ease-in motion-reduce:animate-none ">…</main> aka getByText('GMAOAcceder al Sistemapowered')
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for getByRole('main')
105 | // Check for semantic HTML structure 106 | const main = page.getByRole('main') > 107 | await expect(main).toBeVisible() | ^ 108 | 109 | // Check for "GMAO" text (no h1 element) 110 | const gmaoText = page.getByText('GMAO') at C:\Users\ambso\dev\gmao-hiansa\tests\e2e\story-1.4-landing-page.spec.ts:107:24
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\story-1.4-landing-page-Lan-9e545-AA-contraste-touch-targets--chromium\test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
